next_steps: Perform renal biopsy for histopathological diagnosis
Order serologic workup including ANA, dsDNA, C3/C4, and Anti-PLA2R antibodies
Perform 24-hour urine collection for quantification of proteinuria
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis to screen for dysproteinemia
Initiate ACE inhibitor or ARB for antiproteinuric therapy
Initiate venous thromboembolism prophylaxis given severe hypoalbuminemia
Evaluate for secondary causes of nephrotic syndrome including malignancy screen
